banned.reason: Prefer the read tool over cat — it supports pagination via offset and limit parameters.
Prefer the read tool over sed -n for reading parts of a file — use the offset and limit parameters to target specific line ranges.
Prefer the edit tool over sed -i for in-place text replacements — use edits[].oldText and edits[].newText to make precise changes.
Prefer the find tool over the find command — it respects .gitignore and returns results faster.
